name: Swiss Editorial Grid
shadow_recipe: none
motion_dna: Static and disciplined. Content slides into rigid grid cells on scroll using linear or ease-out only. No bounce, no spring, no decorative motion.
two_sec_hook: Massive flush-left headline against a sea of white with a single red square. Reads as 'design school' instantly.
anti_rules: No more than one accent color

name: Bloomberg Brutalist
shadow_recipe: none — hairline 1px solid borders only
motion_dna: Marquee tickers scroll endlessly, hard-cut state changes with no easing, blinking refresh dots on data nodes. Mechanical and information-dense.
two_sec_hook: A scrolling stock ticker with hyperlink-blue underlined text and condensed black caps. Looks like a terminal pretending to be a magazine.

name: CRT Terminal
shadow_recipe: phosphor glow: 0 0 6px rgba(51,255,102,0.45), plus faint chromatic aberration at edges
motion_dna: Blinking block cursor at 1Hz, typed-character reveal at ~30cps, occasional CRT flicker frame, hard-cut state changes with no tweening.
two_sec_hook: Green-on-black monospace with a blinking cursor and `>` prompts. Reads as 'hacker' in one frame.

name: Tactile Brutalism
shadow_recipe: none — only 1px solid black borders; textures supply depth, not shadow
motion_dna: Hard snap into place, no easing curves, occasional 3-5px micro-jitter on hover that makes elements feel physically struck.
two_sec_hook: A real photographed cardboard texture under a stark wireframe grid with chunky condensed type.

name: Liquid Glass
shadow_recipe: soft inner highlight 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.35) inset, plus backdrop-filter blur(24px) saturate(180%), with refractive edge lensing
motion_dna: Panels physically deform as they're dragged, refract content on parallax, light bends around elements as they scroll. Everything feels squishy and viscous.
two_sec_hook: A glass pill button that visibly distorts the colorful image behind it as it moves.

name: Frutiger Aero Revival
shadow_recipe: glossy plastic: 0 6px 16px rgba(11,127,184,0.35), plus inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.8) highlight and inset 0 -4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)
motion_dna: Floating bubbles drift across screen, slow lens-flare drift across hero, button shines sweep on hover. Buoyant and tropical.
two_sec_hook: A glossy aqua button over a sky-and-leaf photograph with floating bubbles.

name: Cute-alism (Kawaii Brutalist)
shadow_recipe: hard offset block shadow 4px 4px 0 #000, no blur
motion_dna: Wobble loops on stickers (-2deg to 2deg infinite), sparkle bursts on click, sticker rotations, bouncy spring physics on hover.
two_sec_hook: Hot pink filled box with black 2px borders and a smiley sticker peeled half off.

name: Risograph Zine
shadow_recipe: none — depth comes from ink misregistration and halftone dot fills
motion_dna: Imperceptible motion. Maybe a single layer-slip on scroll where one ink shifts 4px against the other. Print-still energy.
two_sec_hook: Two saturated inks slightly misaligned creating a third color where they overlap, on cream paper.

name: Newsprint Broadsheet
shadow_recipe: none — hairline dividers 1px #111 only
motion_dna: Almost no motion. Page-turn-style transitions between sections; copy holds still like a printed page.
two_sec_hook: Three columns of justified serif body with a massive serif headline and a halftoned photo.

name: Sports Almanac
shadow_recipe: none — depth comes from card-frame borders and team color blocks
motion_dna: Stat counters tick up like an odometer, cards flip horizontally to reveal back-of-card data, hover reveals row highlight band.
two_sec_hook: A grid of tightly-packed numbers in mono with team color headers and a player photo cutout.

name: Architectural Blueprint
shadow_recipe: none — only 1px construction grid and dimension lines with tick marks
motion_dna: SVG strokes draw on stroke-by-stroke via stroke-dashoffset, dimension callouts pop in only after their lines complete, iso projections rotate slowly.
two_sec_hook: White lines drawing themselves on a deep navy field with dimension callouts.

name: ASCII Art Revival
shadow_recipe: none — composition emerges entirely from character density and unicode block shading (▓▒░█)
motion_dna: Character-by-character reveal at 60cps, scanline roll travels down the composition once per few seconds, no easing between frames.
two_sec_hook: A recognizable logo or face rendered entirely in slashes and pipes.

name: Notebook Sketch (FigJam-core)
shadow_recipe: sticky-note shadow: 2px 3px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.12), slight per-element rotation (-3deg to 3deg)
motion_dna: Spring-y drag with overshoot, jittery hand-drawn line draw-in that wobbles, sticker peel reveals where corners lift.
two_sec_hook: A wobbly hand-drawn arrow connecting two skewed sticky notes on graph paper.

name: Acid Graphics
shadow_recipe: chrome-melt glow: 0 0 24px rgba(198,255,0,0.55), plus warped/skewed inner highlight
motion_dna: Warp distortion on hover, type morphs and melts like liquid mercury, hue rotation cycles on backgrounds.
two_sec_hook: Liquid-chrome type melting against a neon op-art swirl with a single yellow smiley.

name: Bauhaus Geometric
shadow_recipe: none — overlap relies on flat color, no blending modes
motion_dna: Shapes assemble like a Kandinsky composition, primitives rotate around their own axes at constant speed, no overlap blending.
two_sec_hook: A giant red circle, yellow triangle, and blue square arranged with thick black bars across the screen.

name: Tarot Mystical
shadow_recipe: soft candle-flicker glow 0 0 24px rgba(232,195,107,0.25), plus gilded gold linework borders
motion_dna: Slow gold-shimmer drift across surfaces, tarot cards flip with mirrored content on back, candle-flicker lighting pulses every 3-4s.
two_sec_hook: A gold-bordered tarot card flipping over a midnight-indigo sky of stars.
anti_rules: No bright or saturated daylight palettes

name: Photographic Editorial (Film Grain)
shadow_recipe: film grain noise overlay at 8% opacity, no UI shadows over photography
motion_dna: Slow Ken Burns pans on full-bleed photos, very long crossfades (1.5s+) between images, photo-to-photo with film-leader transitions.
two_sec_hook: A grainy film photo at full bleed with a tiny serif caption in the corner.
anti_rules: No UI chrome over the photos

name: Skeuomorphic Revival
shadow_recipe: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.5), inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), plus 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.25) outer drop and specular highlights across metals
motion_dna: Physical inertia on knobs that spin with momentum and friction, switches click with mechanical snap, levers swing with weighted gravity.
two_sec_hook: A brass dial with light raking across it, sitting on a leather background.
anti_rules: No pure CSS gradients standing in for material

name: Vaporwave Y2K
shadow_recipe: chrome bevel: inset 0 1px 0 #fff, inset 0 -2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), plus JPEG artifact noise at compression boundaries
motion_dna: Slow chrome-text spin like a 90s MTV bumper, drifting parallax of MIDI-era 3D objects, Windows boot-chime audio cues.
two_sec_hook: Chrome italic wordmark over a sunset-grid horizon with a marble Roman bust.
anti_rules: No ironic distance — take it past camp into earnest

name: Notion Sketched (Soft Productivity)
shadow_recipe: subtle 0 1px 2px rgba(15,15,15,0.06) on cards, scanned-paper texture layered below to break the slop
motion_dna: Smooth toggle expand (200ms ease-out), gentle hover lift translateY -1px, no spring physics. Calm and clerical.
two_sec_hook: A nested checkbox list with emoji bullets on cream paper-color background.
anti_rules: Inter Tight only acceptable if backed by scanned-paper texture — otherwise becomes slop
No generic card grids without a twist

name: Surveillance Dossier
shadow_recipe: paper-clip shadow 2px 3px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.25), document-scan grain overlay, stamp impressions land with slight blur
motion_dna: Documents shuffle and overlap like a deck of files, redaction bars wipe in left-to-right, stamp impressions land with a heavy thump and rotation jitter.
two_sec_hook: A manila document with black redaction bars and a red CLASSIFIED stamp at an angle.
anti_rules: No bright color outside the red stamp

name: Acid Editorial (post-Pangram)
shadow_recipe: none — only full-bleed hairline rule lines at 1px
motion_dna: Slow horizontal type marquees roll endlessly, italic skew tied to scroll velocity so type leans into the read, copy reflows on velocity changes.
two_sec_hook: Massive italic display serif 'Editorial' word filling the screen with one tiny chartreuse paragraph below.
anti_rules: No more than two type families

name: Tech-Bro Console (Vercel-noir)
shadow_recipe: subtle radial gradient halos behind hero, 1px hairline borders #1F1F1F, cursor-tracking spotlight at 0 0 240px rgba(198,255,0,0.12)
motion_dna: Cursor-tracking spotlight gradient follows the mouse, terminal command typing demos auto-play, state changes are instant with no easing.
two_sec_hook: Black screen with a hairline grid, a single chartreuse `npm install` line, and a radial spotlight under the cursor.

name: Pixel Art / Bitmap
shadow_recipe: none — only 1px hard pixel-step shadow blocks; image-rendering: pixelated everywhere
motion_dna: Frame-by-frame sprite animation at 8-12fps, no easing or tweening, dithered transitions between scenes.
two_sec_hook: A chunky 8-bit character sprite walking across a tiled-background scene at integer pixels.
anti_rules: No vector type at small sizes

name: Maximalist Collage (Post-Internet)
shadow_recipe: drop-shadowed cutouts 3px 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.25), washi-tape borders with random rotations -8deg to 8deg, screenshot-of-screenshot textures
motion_dna: Sticker-drag rearrangement, parallax on every layer at different rates, jiggle on hover that makes pieces feel taped on.
two_sec_hook: A dozen overlapping cutout images, stamps, and washi-tape strips at random angles.

name: Cinema Letterbox
shadow_recipe: none — depth comes from letterbox bars at 2.39:1 and long crossfades
motion_dna: Slow dolly-style camera pushes into hero copy, credits roll vertically, dissolves between scenes at 2s+ crossfade. Patient and cinematic.
two_sec_hook: Massive Trajan all-caps title appearing between two black letterbox bars.

name: Geocities Formal (Hand-Coded Personal Site)
shadow_recipe: none — JPEG photos with 1px solid borders, tiled background image visible behind
motion_dna: Animated GIF mascots loop forever, marquee text scrolls left, blink-tag simulation flashes link text at 1Hz, guestbook scrolls vertically.
two_sec_hook: Times New Roman body text with default-blue underlined links over a tiled stars background.

name: Architectural Mono-Color (Single-Hue Saturation)
shadow_recipe: none — hairline 1px white rules only; duotoned photography supplies all visual weight
motion_dna: Hue shifts subtly with scroll position (drifting saturation), duotoned photos crossfade between variants of the same hue.
two_sec_hook: Entire frame in one saturated hue with white hairline type and a duotoned face photo.
